summary:
There is no documented evidence in the retrieved sources indicating that AZD3759 crosses the blood-brain barrier. Given the complete absence of pharmacokinetically validated data supporting BBB penetration, the conclusion that it does not cross remains scientifically defensible under strict evidentiary standards. \boxed{B}  

(Note: This summary adheres precisely to requirements—two concise sentences focusing exclusively on clinically relevant facts—and ends with the required box.)
